name: Cash Giant 17
description_short: Cash Giant offers payday loans and cash advance services with locations in Lathrup Village and Southfield, Michigan, providing fast funding for emergency cash needs.
description_long:
Cash Giant is a payday loan and cash advance service provider operating in the Michigan market with at least two physical locations. The company has established a presence in the Detroit metropolitan area, with stores in Lathrup Village and Southfield, allowing customers to access services through in-person visits. Based on the website information, the company positions itself as a fast funding solution for consumers facing immediate financial needs.

Cash Giant's core offering is payday loans and cash advance services. Customers can visit either their Lathrup Village location at 28645 Southfield Road or their Southfield location at 19771 West 12 Mile Road to access these services. The company emphasizes speed of service, stating that their "friendly staff will get you the money you need fast." The business operates with extended weekday hours (10 AM–6 PM Monday through Thursday and Friday) and limited weekend availability (10 AM–2 PM on Saturdays), with no Sunday service.

Cash Giant distinguishes itself through its multi-location convenience in the greater Detroit area, allowing customers to choose between two nearby offices. The company provides phone contact options for both locations, enabling customers to call ahead rather than walk in unannounced. The Lathrup Village location is positioned near the intersection of Southfield Road and San Rosa Boulevard, making it accessible to residents in that specific area.

As a traditional payday lender, Cash Giant offers a straightforward but high-cost borrowing solution suitable only for genuine emergencies. Customers should be aware that payday loans typically carry significantly higher fees and interest rates compared to traditional bank loans, making them an expensive form of short-term credit. The company's service model relies on physical store visits or phone contact, which may be less convenient than online alternatives. No information is provided on the company's website regarding loan terms, maximum amounts, fees, or APR rates, making it difficult for consumers to assess costs before visiting.
pros: Two physical locations in Michigan for customer convenience (Lathrup Village and Southfield)
Extended weekday business hours until 6 PM, allowing access after standard work hours
Phone contact available for both locations to check availability before visiting
Same-day or next-day funding typical of payday loan products
No advance application requirements—walk-in service available
Local, established business with physical storefronts rather than online-only operation
cons: Payday loans are typically high-cost debt with APR rates often exceeding 300%, creating cycles of debt
No pricing, fee structure, or loan term information disclosed on website—customers must visit in person
Limited weekend hours and no Sunday service restrict access for working customers
Only two locations in Michigan serve entire customer base, limiting convenience for some areas
No information about alternative loan products, making it unclear if lower-cost options exist
best_for: Consumers with genuine one-time emergencies who need cash within 24 hours and have no other borrowing options
Individuals in the Lathrup Village or Southfield areas who prefer face-to-face service with local staff
Borrowers with poor credit who are unable to qualify for bank loans or personal lines of credit
diagnosis: Cash Giant is best for consumers in the Detroit area experiencing genuine financial emergencies who need immediate cash and have exhausted other borrowing options. The critical caveat is that payday loans are extremely expensive short-term debt—customers should only use this service as a last resort and should avoid treating it as a regular borrowing solution, as the high fees and interest rates can create cycles of debt that are difficult to escape.
services: Multiple location access (Lathrup Village and Southfield offices)
Fast funding for emergency cash needs
